race.comment: Intriguing race to assess with a majority of these coming through the Port Lincoln Cup 16 days ago. I NEED A DRINK (5) was well supported late and got back to somewhere near his best when beaten less than a length in a blanket finish. Is drawn to advantage and keep Milnes. Can get the job done this time. TALENT SCOUT (7) was a flashing light in the Cup when getting home nicely into a midfield finish. Peaking now and is drawn much kinder. Bold showing anticipated. I'M A DEXSTAR (3) started the same price as INAD in the Cup but when amiss. Happy to excuse the hiccup, with his prior form as strong as anything else in the race. Interesting to see what they do from the draw. TOORAK BLAZE (9) was another that was doing his best work late in the Cup. If the tempo is genuine, he can reel them in late. SUPER VALENTINE (6) is another worth keeping safe on best figures.
